name: Eggplant Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the eggplant all over and roast it on a baking sheet at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until it is desiccated. Let it cool.
2. Scoop out the flesh into a mixing bowl and mash it with a fork until smooth.
3. Saute the garlic and shallots in a nonstick pan (with water or a little stock if desired).
4. Add this to the eggplant. Stir in the flour, baking powder, eggs, stock, parsley, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
5. Spray a skillet with cooking spray and heat it to medium heat. Dollop spoonfuls of the batter into the skillet and cook until golden. Flip as needed.
(Continue flipping the pancakes until they are cooked through on both sides.)
